name: npm-install
description: Condensed npm output: install summary and errors only

pipeline.pattern: (^npm warn deprecated|^npm notice|looking for funding|run .npm fund|npm warn |^npm info )
(^added |^removed |^up to date|^npm error|^npm ERR!|^ERESOLVE|peer dep|Could not resolve)

tests.name: successful install
tests.input:
npm warn deprecated inflight@1.0.6: This module is not supported
npm warn deprecated glob@7.2.3: Glob versions prior to v9 are no longer supported

added 245 packages, and audited 246 packages in 12s

29 packages are looking for funding
  run `npm fund` for details

found 0 vulnerabilities
tests.expected: added 245 packages, and audited 246 packages in 12s

tests.name: already up to date
tests.input:
up to date, audited 246 packages in 1s

found 0 vulnerabilities
tests.expected: up to date, audited 246 packages in 1s

tests.name: install error
tests.input:
npm ERR! code ERESOLVE
npm ERR! ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
npm ERR! Could not resolve dependency:
npm ERR! peer react@"^16.8.0" from package@1.0.0
tests.expected:
npm ERR! code ERESOLVE
npm ERR! ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree
npm ERR! Could not resolve dependency:
npm ERR! peer react@"^16.8.0" from package@1.0.0
